category.scope_note: Grid-tied photovoltaic inverter comparison. Energy storage inverter and hybrid storage functions are excluded.

labels.zh: 并网光伏逆变器（不含储能）
labels.zht: 併網光伏逆變器（不含儲能）

title.en: China-to-EU Solar Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国光伏逆变器进入欧盟：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國光伏逆變器進入歐盟：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China grid-tied PV inverter documentation against EU market access expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国并网光伏逆变器文件与欧盟准入要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國併網光伏逆變器文件與歐盟准入要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, notified-body assessment, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify the current applicable EU law, harmonised standards, grid-code requirements, and destination-country procedures with qualified professionals before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、公告机构评审或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在出货前应与合格专业人士核验现行欧盟法律、协调标准、电网规范和目的国程序。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、公告機構評審或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在出貨前應與合格專業人士核驗現行歐盟法律、協調標準、電網規範和目的國程序。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, notified body, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
